productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Allegra White Sports Shoes
description: For all you fitness freaks, here's one fab running shoe from adidas. The Allegra 4 is a perfect lightweight trainer with a perfectly engineered outsole to make running the best experience of your life.UpperHeavily meshed upper with an inner bootie for enhanced breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortCushioned footbed for in-step comfortadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole with Adiwear in the heel for enhanced durability Waffle pattern lugs in the forefoot and grooved on the heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for ease of movementImpact guidance line to distribute shock evenly and enhance energy returnScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the back foot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or sTPRe in direct sunlight
